localized.title: Live A.M.A. (21/05/2026) - Your Branded AI Is Here!

snippet.title: Live A.M.A. (21/05/2026) - Your Branded AI Is Here!

snippet.description:
New in Climbo: your AI, fully branded.

Agencies can now customize the entire AI experience for their clients.

Give your AI its own name, logo, and identity.
Personalize every single agent — SEO Agent, Social Agent, and GEO Agent — so the platform feels more unique, branded, and personal.

And that’s not all.

We’re also introducing AI Chat.

Your clients can now take action simply by chatting with their AI.

They can send review requests, get reports, update Google Business Profile hours, and much more — without navigating complex dashboards.

Just one simple interface:
Chat with your AI. Get things done.

Built for agencies that want to offer a smarter, more branded client experience.
